abilities.description: When you hold a weapon and sing a keen for those it has killed, roll +heart. On a strong hit, the wielder marks progress when they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}. If they roll a 1 on their action die when making a move to attack, the magic is spent. On a weak hit, as above, but the voices of those who were slain join in your song; suffer -2 spirit.

As above, and the wielder may also (one time only) add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit when they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a903d120af3b1475]{Battle}.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
